title: Bohemian Rhapsody
funFacts: This iconic song was recorded in [date:1975] and features three distinct sections: a ballad, an operatic passage, and a hard rock finale. [artist:Freddie Mercury] wrote the entire [song:Bohemian Rhapsody] on piano and it took three weeks to record. The song was initially considered too long for radio play but became one of [artist:Queen]'s most successful singles. This song is a masterpiece of rock music and has been covered by many artists. It is a must-listen for any rock fan. It has been said that this song is the most played song in the world. The song appears on the album [album:A Night at the Opera].
